name: Aarav & Pooja Patel
message: Congratulations Shivam and Richa! So happy for both of you. Wishing you a beautiful journey ahead!

name: Neha Darji
message: Loads of love to the lovely couple! Can't wait to celebrate with you guys in Vadodara!

name: Kunal Shah
message: Heartiest congratulations guys! Truly sorry I won't be able to make it, but sending my best blessings and wishes!
